subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad Mahmud! The essence of existence hath manifested on the Promised Day, and the world of being hath attained a praiseworthy station, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد محمود سر وجود در یوم موعود جلوه نمود و عالم شهود مقام محمود گشت ولی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action
